# ERA Safety

> Location. Capture. Improve. Respond.

ERA Safety is the closed-loop emergency response platform that connects people, sites, and responsibilities into one coordinated workflow.

## Platform Pillars

### 1. Critical
Live incident coordination, safe lists, response tasks, and simulation workflows that mirror real emergencies.

### 2. Capture
Hazard, incident, and operational reporting with ownership, deadlines, and follow-up.

### 3. Improve
Competency mapping, training oversight, debrief feedback loops, and readiness tracking.

### 4. My Site
Area structures, warden assignments, plans, diagrams, and document oversight across one site or multiple properties.

## Sectors Served

- Healthcare
- Aged Care
- Government & Councils
- Commercial Property & Retail
- Education

## Compliance

- AS3745-2010 (Planning for emergencies in facilities)
- AS4083-2010 (Planning for emergencies — Health care facilities)
- Work Health and Safety (WHS) regulations
- ISO 45001 (Occupational health and safety management systems)

## Contact

- Website: https://erasafety.net
- Email: sales@erasafety.net

## About

ERA Safety is developed by Emergency Response Alliance Pty Ltd.
